Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Direct definition of binary direct sum using preadditive categories. *)
(** ** Contents
- Definition of binary direct sums (also known as biproducts)
- Criteria for binary direct sums
- Quotient has binary direct sums
*)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Notations.

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.BinaryOperations.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Monoids.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Zero.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.CategoriesWithBinOps.

Notation "0" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ + _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "- _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ - _" was already used in scope abgrcat.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PreAdditive.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Epis.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** BinDirectSum is at the same time product and coproduct of the underlying objects together
    with the following equalities

    i1 · p1 = identity  and   i2 · p2 = identity
    i1 · p2 = unit      and   i2 · p1 = unit
            p1 · i1 + p2 · i2 = identity
*)


A: PreAdditive
x, y: A
to_binop x y = op


A: PreAdditive
x, y: A
to_binop x y = op

  reflexivity.
Defined.

Section def_bindirectsums.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.
  Context (hs := @to_has_homsets A : has_homsets A).

  Open Scope abgrcat.

  (** Definition of binary direct sum. *)
  Definition isBinDirectSum (a b co : A) (i1 : a --> co) (i2 : b --> co)
             (p1 : co --> a) (p2 : co --> b) : hProp :=
    i1 · p1 = 1  ∧  i2 · p2 = 1  ∧
    i1 · p2 = 0  ∧  i2 · p1 = 0  ∧
    p1 · i1 + p2 · i2 = 1.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2
→ isBinCoproduct A a b co i1 i2

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2
→ isBinCoproduct A a b co i1 i2

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
isBinCoproduct A a b co i1 i2

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
∃! fg : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
((i1 · fg)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · fg)%cat = g)%type

A ⟦ co, T ⟧

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0

g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧

 ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type) 
  ?x
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
    ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type)
     y)
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
 ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type) y
→ y = ?x

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b

e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A

e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A

  ((p1 · f)%cat + (p2 · g)%cat)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
((i1 · (p1 · f + p2 · g))%cat = f)%type
× ((i2 · (p1 · f + p2 · g))%cat = g)%type

a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
((0 · f)%cat + g = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
(to_unel b T + g = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
(g = g)%type

        reflexivity.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
    ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type)
     y)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
    ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type)
     h)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
isaprop
  (((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type)
 apply isapropdirprod;apply hs.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
 ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type) y
→ y = (p1 · f)%cat + (p2 · g)%cat
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ co, T ⟧,
 ((i1 · t)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · t)%cat = g)%type) h
→ h = (p1 · f)%cat + (p2 · g)%cat

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A

i2: b --> co

e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type × ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type
→ h = (p1 · f)%cat + (p2 · g)%cat
 
A: PreAdditive

a, b, co: A

i2: b --> co

e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
p: ((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type
q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type
(h = (p1 · f)%cat + (p2 · g)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive

a, b, co: A

i2: b --> co

e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
p: ((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type
q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type
(h = (p1 · (i1 · h))%cat + (p2 · (i2 · h))%cat)%type

A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧

h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
p: ((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type
q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((to_binop co co (p1 · i1) (p2 · i2) · h)%cat =
 to_binop co T (p1 · i1 · h)%cat (p2 · i2 · h)%cat)%type
(h = (p1 · i1 · h)%cat + (p2 · i2 · h)%cat)%type

q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type

 (p1 · i1 · h)%cat + (p2 · i2 · h)%cat)%type

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0

h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
p: ((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type
q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type

A: PreAdditive

a, b, co: A

i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

f: A ⟦ a, T ⟧
g: A ⟦ b, T ⟧
h: A ⟦ co, T ⟧
p: ((i1 · h)%cat = f)%type
q: ((i2 · h)%cat = g)%type
Q: (((p1 · i1 + p2 · i2) · h)%cat =
 (p1 · i1 · h)%cat + (p2 · i2 · h)%cat)%type
(h = h)%type
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2
→ isBinProduct A a b co p1 p2

A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
q: (((f · i1 + g · i2) · p1)%cat =
 (f · i1 · p1)%cat + (g · i2 · p1)%cat)%type
((f · i1 · p1)%cat + (g · i2 · p1)%cat = f)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · i1 · p1)%cat + (g · i2 · p1)%cat = f)%type

        
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · (i1 · p1))%cat + (g · (i2 · p1))%cat = f)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · identity a)%cat + (g · (i2 · p1))%cat = f)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(f + (g · (i2 · p1))%cat = f)%type

        
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(f + (g · 0)%cat = f)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(f + to_unel T a = f)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(f = f)%type

        reflexivity.
      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(((f · i1 + g · i2) · p2)%cat = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
q: ((to_binop T co (f · i1) (g · i2) · p2)%cat =
 to_binop T b (f · i1 · p2)%cat (g · i2 · p2)%cat)%type
(((f · i1 + g · i2) · p2)%cat = g)%type

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
q: (((f · i1 + g · i2) · p2)%cat =
 (f · i1 · p2)%cat + (g · i2 · p2)%cat)%type
(((f · i1 + g · i2) · p2)%cat = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive

a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
q: (((f · i1 + g · i2) · p2)%cat =
 (f · i1 · p2)%cat + (g · i2 · p2)%cat)%type
((f · i1 · p2)%cat + (g · i2 · p2)%cat = g)%type

a, b, co: A

e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co

f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · (i1 · p2))%cat + (g · (i2 · p2))%cat = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive

a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · (i1 · p2))%cat + (g · identity b)%cat = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · (i1 · p2))%cat + g = g)%type

        
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
((f · 0)%cat + g = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(to_unel T b + g = g)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
(g = g)%type

        reflexivity.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
    ((t · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((t · p2)%cat = g)%type)
     y)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
    ((t · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((t · p2)%cat = g)%type)
     h)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
isaprop
  (((h · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type)
 apply isapropdirprod;apply hs.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
 ((t · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((t · p2)%cat = g)%type) y
→ y = (f · i1)%cat + (g · i2)%cat
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ T, co ⟧,
 ((t · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((t · p2)%cat = g)%type) h
→ h = (f · i1)%cat + (g · i2)%cat
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
((h · p1)%cat = f)%type × ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
→ h = (f · i1)%cat + (g · i2)%cat
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
(h = (f · i1)%cat + (g · i2)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
(h = (h · p1 · i1)%cat + (h · p2 · i2)%cat)%type

      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
(h = (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type

      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((h · to_binop co co (p1 · i1) (p2 · i2))%cat =
 to_binop T co (h · (p1 · i1))%cat
   (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
(h = (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type

      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((h · (p1 · i1 + p2 · i2))%cat =
 (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
(h = (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((h · (p1 · i1 + p2 · i2))%cat =
 (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
(h = (h · (p1 · i1 + p2 · i2))%cat)%type

      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((h · (p1 · i1 + p2 · i2))%cat =
 (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
(h = (h · identity co)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, co: A
i1: a --> co
i2: b --> co
p1: co --> a
p2: co --> b
e11: (i1 · p1)%cat = identity a
e22: (i2 · p2)%cat = identity b
e12: (i1 · p2)%cat = 0
e21: (i2 · p1)%cat = 0
e: (p1 · i1)%cat + (p2 · i2)%cat = identity co
T: A
f: A ⟦ T, a ⟧
g: A ⟦ T, b ⟧
h: A ⟦ T, co ⟧
p: ((h · p1)%cat = f)%type
q: ((h · p2)%cat = g)%type
Q: ((h · (p1 · i1 + p2 · i2))%cat =
 (h · (p1 · i1))%cat + (h · (p2 · i2))%cat)%type
(h = h)%type
 reflexivity.
  Defined.

  Definition to_IdIn1 {a b co : A} {i1 : a --> co} {i2 : b --> co} {p1 : co --> a} {p2 : co --> b}
             (B : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    i1 · p1 = identity a := pr1 B.

  Definition to_IdIn2 {a b co : A} {i1 : a --> co} {i2 : b --> co} {p1 : co --> a} {p2 : co --> b}
             (B : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    i2 · p2 = identity b := pr12 B.

  Definition to_Unel1 {a b co : A} {i1 : a --> co} {i2 : b --> co} {p1 : co --> a} {p2 : co --> b}
             (B : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    i1 · p2 = (to_unel a b) := pr122 B.

  Definition to_Unel2 {a b co : A} {i1 : a --> co} {i2 : b --> co} {p1 : co --> a} {p2 : co --> b}
             (B : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    i2 · p1 = (to_unel b a) := pr122 (pr2 B).

  Definition to_BinOpId {a b co : A} {i1 : a --> co} {i2 : b --> co} {p1 : co --> a} {p2 : co --> b}
             (B : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    (to_binop co co) (p1 · i1) (p2 · i2) = identity co := pr222 (pr2 B).

  (** The following definition constructs isBinDirectSum from data. *)
  Definition make_isBinDirectSum (a b co : A)
             (i1 : a --> co) (i2 : b --> co) (p1 : co --> a) (p2 : co --> b)
             (H1 : i1 · p1 = identity a) (H2 : i2 · p2 = identity b)
             (H3 : i1 · p2 = (to_unel a b)) (H4 : i2 · p1 = (to_unel b a))
             (H5 : (to_binop co co) (p1 · i1) (p2 · i2) = identity co)
    : isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2 := H1,,H2,,H3,,H4,,H5.

  (** Definition of BinDirectSums. *)
  Definition BinDirectSum (a b : A) : UU :=
    ∑ coab : (∑ co : A, a --> co × b --> co × co --> a × co --> b),
             isBinDirectSum a b (pr1 coab) (pr1 (pr2 coab)) (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 coab)))
                                (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 coab)))) (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 coab)))).

  (** Construction of BinDirectSum. *)
  Definition make_BinDirectSum (a b co : A) (i1 : a --> co) (i2 : b --> co)
             (p1 : co --> a) (p2 : co --> b) (H :  isBinDirectSum a b co i1 i2 p1 p2) :
    BinDirectSum a b := tpair _ (tpair _ co (i1,,(i2,,(p1,,p2)))) H.

  (** BinDirectSum in categories. *)
  Definition BinDirectSums : UU := ∏ (a b : A), BinDirectSum a b.

  Definition make_BinDirectSums (H : ∏ (a b : A), BinDirectSum a b) : BinDirectSums := H.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
hProp

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
hProp

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
isaprop (∏ a b : A, ∥ BinDirectSum a b ∥)

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
p: A
isofhlevel 1 (∏ b : A, ∥ BinDirectSum p b ∥)

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
p, q: A
isofhlevel 1 (∥ BinDirectSum p q ∥)

    apply isapropishinh.
  Defined.

  (** The direct sum object. *)
  Definition BinDirectSumOb {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) : A := pr1 (pr1 B).
  Coercion BinDirectSumOb : BinDirectSum >-> ob.

  (** Accessor functions *)
  Definition to_In1 {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) : A⟦a, B⟧ := dirprod_pr1 (pr2 (pr1 B)).

  Definition to_In2 {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) : A⟦b, B⟧ :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 (pr1 B))).

  Definition to_Pr1 {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) : A⟦B, a⟧ :=
    dirprod_pr1 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 (pr1 B)))).

  Definition to_Pr2 {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) : A⟦B, b⟧ :=
    dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (dirprod_pr2 (pr2 (pr1 B)))).

  (** Another coercion *)
  Definition BinDirectSum_isBinDirectSum {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) :
    isBinDirectSum a b B (to_In1 B) (to_In2 B) (to_Pr1 B) (to_Pr2 B) := pr2 B.
  Coercion BinDirectSum_isBinDirectSum : BinDirectSum >-> hProptoType.

  (** Construction of BinCoproduct and BinProduct from BinDirectSum. *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
BinCoproduct a b

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
BinCoproduct a b

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
isBinCoproduct A a b B (to_In1 B) (to_In2 B)

    exact (to_isBinCoproduct B).
  Defined.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
BinProduct A a b

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
BinProduct A a b

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
isBinProduct A a b B (to_Pr1 B) (to_Pr2 B)

    exact (to_isBinProduct B).
  Defined.

  (** An arrow to BinDirectSum and arrow from BinDirectSum. *)
  Definition ToBinDirectSum {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : c --> a)
             (g : c --> b) : A⟦c, B⟧ := BinProductArrow A (BinDirectSum_BinProduct B) f g.

  Definition FromBinDirectSum {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : a --> c)
             (g : b --> c) : A⟦B, c⟧ := BinCoproductArrow (BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct B) f g.

  (** Commutativity of BinDirectSum. *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> c),
(to_In1 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = f

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> c),
(to_In1 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = f

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c
((to_In1 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = f)%type

    apply (BinCoproductIn1Commutes A a b (BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct B) c f g).
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> c),
(to_In2 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = g

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : a --> c) (g : b --> c),
(to_In2 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = g

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c
((to_In2 B · FromBinDirectSum B f g)%cat = g)%type

    apply (BinCoproductIn2Commutes A a b (BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct B) c f g).
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : c --> a) (g : c --> b),
(ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : c --> a) (g : c --> b),
(ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f)%type

    apply (BinProductPr1Commutes A a b (BinDirectSum_BinProduct B) c f g).
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : c --> a) (g : c --> b),
(ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr2 B)%cat = g

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
∏ (c : A) (f : c --> a) (g : c --> b),
(ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr2 B)%cat = g

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((ToBinDirectSum B f g · to_Pr2 B)%cat = g)%type

    apply (BinProductPr2Commutes A a b (BinDirectSum_BinProduct B) c f g).
  Qed.

  (** Uniqueness of arrow to and from BinDirectSum using the BinProduct and BinCoproduct
      structures. *)
  Definition ToBinDirectSumUnique {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : c --> a)
             (g : c --> b) (k : c --> B) :
    k · to_Pr1 B = f -> k · to_Pr2 B = g -> k = ToBinDirectSum B f g :=
    BinProductArrowUnique _ _ _ (BinDirectSum_BinProduct B) c f g k.

  Definition FromBinDirectSumUnique {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : a --> c)
             (g : b --> c) (k : B --> c) :
    to_In1 B · k = f -> to_In2 B · k = g -> k = FromBinDirectSum B f g :=
    BinCoproductArrowUnique _ _ _ (BinDirectSum_BinCoproduct B) c f g k.

  (** Uniqueness of arrows to and from BinDirectSum *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
c, d: A
DS: BinDirectSum c d
x: A
k1, k2: x --> DS
(k1 · to_Pr1 DS)%cat = (k2 · to_Pr1 DS)%cat
→ (k1 · to_Pr2 DS)%cat = (k2 · to_Pr2 DS)%cat
  → k1 = k2

→ (k1 · to_Pr2 DS)%cat = (k2 · to_Pr2 DS)%cat
  → k1 = k2

(k1 = k2)%type

(ToBinDirectSum DS (k1 · to_Pr1 DS)%cat
   (k1 · to_Pr2 DS)%cat = k2)%type

A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
c, d: A
DS: BinDirectSum c d
x: A
k1, k2: DS --> x
H1: ((to_In1 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In1 DS · k2)%cat)%type
H2: ((to_In2 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In2 DS · k2)%cat)%type
((to_In2 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In2 DS · k1)%cat)%type

c, d: A
DS: BinDirectSum c d
x: A
k1, k2: DS --> x

H2: ((to_In2 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In2 DS · k2)%cat)%type
((to_In1 DS · k2)%cat = (to_In1 DS · k1)%cat)%type

A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
c, d: A
DS: BinDirectSum c d
x: A

H2: ((to_In2 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In2 DS · k2)%cat)%type
((to_In2 DS · k1)%cat = (to_In2 DS · k1)%cat)%type
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** The following definitions give a formula for the unique morphisms to and from the
      BinDirectSum. These formulas are important when one uses bindirectsums. The formulas are

      to bindirectsum unique arrow     =   f · in1 + g · in2
      from bindirectsum unique arrow   =   pr1 · f + pr2 · g
   *)
  Definition ToBinDirectSumFormula {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : c --> a)
             (g : c --> b) : A⟦c, B⟧ := (to_binop c B) (f · to_In1 B) (g · to_In2 B).

  Definition FromBinDirectSumFormula {a b : A} (B : BinDirectSum a b) {c : A} (f : a --> c)
             (g : b --> c) : A⟦B, c⟧ := (to_binop B c) (to_Pr1 B · f) (to_Pr2 B · g).

  (** Let us prove that these formulas indeed are the unique morphisms we claimed them to be. *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
(ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g = ToBinDirectSum B f g)%type

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
(ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g = ToBinDirectSum B f g)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f)%type
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g · to_Pr2 B)%cat = g)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f)%type

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((to_binop c B (f · to_In1 B) (g · to_In2 B)
  · to_Pr1 B)%cat = f)%type

hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((pr2 A c B (f · to_In1 B) (g · to_In2 B) · to_Pr1 B)%cat =
 f)%type

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((to_postmor c (to_Pr1 B) (f · to_In1 B)%cat +
  to_postmor c (to_Pr1 B) (g · to_In2 B)%cat)%addmonoid =
 f)%type

c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
(((f · to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)%cat +
  (g · to_In2 B · to_Pr1 B)%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
(((f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B))%cat +
  (g · (to_In2 B · to_Pr1 B))%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
(((f · identity a)%cat +
  (g · (to_In2 B · to_Pr1 B))%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

g: c --> b
((f + (g · (to_In2 B · to_Pr1 B))%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b
((f + (g · to_unel b a)%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: c --> a
g: c --> b

((f + (g · to_unel b a)%cat)%addmonoid = f)%type

g: c --> b

      apply (to_runax c a).

((ToBinDirectSumFormula B f g · to_Pr2 B)%cat = g)%type

  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c
(FromBinDirectSumFormula B f g =
 FromBinDirectSum B f g)%type

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c

 FromBinDirectSum B f g)%type

c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c

 FromBinDirectSum B f g)%type

g: b --> c
XX:= to_postmor_unel A b f: ((0 · f)%cat = 0)%type
(((0%abgrcat · f)%cat + g)%addmonoid = g)%type

      
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
c: A
f: a --> c
g: b --> c
XX:= to_postmor_unel A b f: ((0 · f)%cat = 0)%type
((0%abgrcat + g)%addmonoid = g)%type

      apply (to_lunax b c).
  Qed.

  (** The following definitions give 2 ways to construct a morphisms a ⊕ c --> b ⊕ d from two
      morphisms f : a --> b and g : c --> d , by using the binary direct sums as a product and as a
      coproduct. *)
  Definition BinDirectSumIndAr {a b c d : A} (f : a --> b) (g : c --> d)
             (B1 : BinDirectSum a c) (B2 : BinDirectSum b d) :
    A⟦B1, B2⟧ := ToBinDirectSum B2 ((to_Pr1 B1) · f) ((to_Pr2 B1) · g).

  Definition BinDirectSumIndAr' {a b c d : A} (f : a --> b) (g : c --> d)
             (B1 : BinDirectSum a c) (B2 : BinDirectSum b d) :
    A⟦B1, B2⟧ := FromBinDirectSum B1 (f · (to_In1 B2)) (g · (to_In2 B2)).

  (** Both of the above morphisms are given by the following formula. *)
  Definition BinDirectSumIndArFormula {a b c d: A}  (f : a --> b) (g : c --> d)
             (B1 : BinDirectSum a c) (B2 : BinDirectSum b d) :
    A⟦B1, B2⟧ := (to_binop B1 B2) (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2) (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2).

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(ToBinDirectSum B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(ToBinDirectSumFormula B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat =
 to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat)%type

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr' f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr' f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(FromBinDirectSum B1 (f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (g · to_In2 B2)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(FromBinDirectSumFormula B1 (f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (g · to_In2 B2)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · (f · to_In1 B2))%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g · to_In2 B2))%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · (f · to_In1 B2))%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g · to_In2 B2))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g · to_In2 B2))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat =
 to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f · to_In1 B2)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g · to_In2 B2)%cat)%type

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** Thus we have equality. *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndAr' f g B1 B2)%type

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndAr f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndAr' f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndAr' f g B1 B2)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d: A
f: a --> b
g: c --> d
B1: BinDirectSum a c
B2: BinDirectSum b d
(BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2 =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula f g B1 B2)%type

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** ** Composition of IndAr *)
  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((BinDirectSumIndAr f1 g1 B1 B2
  · BinDirectSumIndAr f2 g2 B2 B3)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndAr (f1 · f2)%cat (g1 · g2)%cat B1 B3)%type

  
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((BinDirectSumIndAr f1 g1 B1 B2
  · BinDirectSumIndAr f2 g2 B2 B3)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndAr (f1 · f2)%cat (g1 · g2)%cat B1 B3)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((BinDirectSumIndArFormula f1 g1 B1 B2
  · BinDirectSumIndAr f2 g2 B2 B3)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndAr (f1 · f2)%cat (g1 · g2)%cat B1 B3)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((BinDirectSumIndArFormula f1 g1 B1 B2
  · BinDirectSumIndArFormula f2 g2 B2 B3)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndAr (f1 · f2)%cat (g1 · g2)%cat B1 B3)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((BinDirectSumIndArFormula f1 g1 B1 B2
  · BinDirectSumIndArFormula f2 g2 B2 B3)%cat =
 BinDirectSumIndArFormula (f1 · f2)%cat (g1 · g2)%cat
   B1 B3)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
((to_binop B1 B2 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2)
    (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2)
  · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
      (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2
       · (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3))%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2
       · (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · (to_Pr1 B2 · f2)
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2
       · (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2 · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2
       · (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2 · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · (to_Pr2 B2 · g2)
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2 · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2 · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3
   (to_Pr1 B1 · (f1 · f2) · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2 · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2 · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · (g1 · g2) · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2 · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2 · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · (to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2) · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2 · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · (to_In1 B2 · to_Pr1 B2) · f2
       · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · (to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2) · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · identity b · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · (to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2) · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type
 
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · (to_In1 B2 · to_Pr2 B2) · g2
       · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    
A: PreAdditive
hs:= to_has_homsets (PA:=A): has_homsets A
a, b, c, d, e, f: A
f1: a --> b
f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f
(to_binop B1 B3
   (to_binop B1 B3
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
      (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · to_unel b e · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · to_In2 B2
    · to_binop B2 B3 (to_Pr1 B2 · f2 · to_In1 B3)
        (to_Pr2 B2 · g2 · to_In2 B3))%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

f2: b --> c
g1: d --> e
g2: e --> f
B1: BinDirectSum a d
B2: BinDirectSum b e

   (to_binop B1 B3 (to_unel B1 B3)
      (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat) =

f2: b --> c

g2: e --> f

B2: BinDirectSum b e
B3: BinDirectSum c f

   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat =
 to_binop B1 B3 (to_Pr1 B1 · f1 · f2 · to_In1 B3)%cat
   (to_Pr2 B1 · g1 · g2 · to_In2 B3)%cat)%type

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

End def_bindirectsums.

Arguments BinDirectSumOb {_ _ _}.
Arguments BinDirectSum {_}.
Arguments to_Pr1 {_ _ _} _.
Arguments to_Pr2 {_ _ _} _.

Arguments to_IdIn2 {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.

Arguments to_Unel2 {_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _}.

Arguments isBinDirectSum {_ _ _ _}.

(** In1 and In2 are monics, and Pr1 and Pr2 are epis. *)
Section bindirectsums_monics_and_epis.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.

  
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
isMonic (to_In1 B)

  
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
isMonic (to_In1 B)

    
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧
H: f · to_In1 B = g · to_In1 B
f = g

    
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧
H: f · to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = g · to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B
f = g

    
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧
H: f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B) =
g · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)
f = g

B: BinDirectSum a b

g · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)

A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧
H: f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B) =
g · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)
X:= to_IdIn1 B: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
X1: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
f · identity a = f

      apply id_right.
    
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧
H: f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B) =
g · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)
X:= to_IdIn1 B: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
X1: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B) = g

f · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B) = ?b

A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ z, a ⟧

g · (to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B)
X:= to_IdIn1 B: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
X1: to_In1 B · to_Pr1 B = identity a
g · identity a = g

      apply id_right.
  Qed.

B: BinDirectSum a b

f = g

B: BinDirectSum a b

f = g

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b

H: f = g

a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ b, z ⟧
H: identity b · f = identity b · g
f = g

    
A: PreAdditive
a, b: A
B: BinDirectSum a b
z: A
f, g: A ⟦ b, z ⟧
H: f = g
f = g
 apply H.
  Qed.

End bindirectsums_monics_and_epis.


(** If a PreAdditive category has BinProducts, then it has all direct sums. *)
Section bindirectsums_criteria.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.
  Hypothesis hs : has_homsets A.
  Variable Z : Zero A.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
· BinProductPr1 A P = identity X

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
· BinProductPr1 A P = identity X

    apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
· BinProductPr2 A P = to_unel X Y

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
· BinProductPr2 A P = to_unel X Y

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
· BinProductPr2 A P = ZeroArrow Z X Y

    apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr1 A P = to_unel Y X

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr1 A P = to_unel Y X

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr1 A P = ZeroArrow Z Y X

    apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr2 A P = identity Y

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
· BinProductPr2 A P = identity Y

    apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P P
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y)) = identity P

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P P
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y)) = identity P

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P P
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y)) · BinProductPr1 A P =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P P
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y)) · BinProductPr2 A P =
identity P · BinProductPr2 A P

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P P
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y)) · BinProductPr1 A P =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P X
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
       (ZeroArrow Z X Y) · BinProductPr1 A P)
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y) · BinProductPr1 A P) =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P X
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · (BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
        (ZeroArrow Z X Y) · BinProductPr1 A P))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
       (identity Y) · BinProductPr1 A P) =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P X
  (BinProductPr1 A P
   · (BinProductArrow A P (identity X)
        (ZeroArrow Z X Y) · BinProductPr1 A P))
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · (BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
        (identity Y) · BinProductPr1 A P)) =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P X (BinProductPr1 A P · identity X)
  (BinProductPr2 A P
   · (BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
        (identity Y) · BinProductPr1 A P)) =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
to_binop P X (BinProductPr1 A P · identity X)
  (BinProductPr2 A P · ZeroArrow Z Y X) =
identity P · BinProductPr1 A P

       (ZeroArrow Z X Y))

A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
∏ (c : A) (f : A ⟦ X, c ⟧) (g : A ⟦ Y, c ⟧),
∃! k : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y) · k =
f
× BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
  · k = g

f

  · k = g

hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A

A ⟦ P, c ⟧
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ X, c ⟧
g: A ⟦ Y, c ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
 BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
 · t = f
 × BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
   · t = g) ?x
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ X, c ⟧
g: A ⟦ Y, c ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
    BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
    · t = f
    × BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X)
        (identity Y) · t = g) y)
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ X, c ⟧
g: A ⟦ Y, c ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ P, c ⟧,
 BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)
 · t = f
 × BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
   · t = g) y → y = ?x

hs: has_homsets A

c: A

g: A ⟦ Y, c ⟧
A ⟦ P, c ⟧
 exact (to_binop (BinProductObject A P) c (BinProductPr1 A P · f) (BinProductPr2 A P · g)).

 BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y)

   · t = g)

hs: has_homsets A

c: A
f: A ⟦ X, c ⟧
g: A ⟦ Y, c ⟧

 × BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y)
   · t = g) y

    (BinProductPr2 A P · g)

X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
isBinProduct A X Y P (BinProductPr1 A P)
  (BinProductPr2 A P)

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
∏ (c : A) (f : A ⟦ c, X ⟧) (g : A ⟦ c, Y ⟧),
∃! k : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
k · BinProductPr1 A P = f × k · BinProductPr2 A P = g

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
∃! k : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
k · BinProductPr1 A P = f × k · BinProductPr2 A P = g

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
A ⟦ c, P ⟧
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
 t · BinProductPr1 A P = f × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g)
  ?x
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
    t · BinProductPr1 A P = f
    × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g) y)
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
 t · BinProductPr1 A P = f × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g)
  y → y = ?x

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
A ⟦ c, P ⟧
 exact (BinProductArrow A P f g).
    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
(λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
 t · BinProductPr1 A P = f × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g)
  (BinProductArrow A P f g)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A P f g · BinProductPr1 A P = f
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A P f g · BinProductPr2 A P = g

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A P f g · BinProductPr1 A P = f
 apply BinProductPr1Commutes.
      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
BinProductArrow A P f g · BinProductPr2 A P = g
 apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
    t · BinProductPr1 A P = f
    × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g) y)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
isaprop
  ((λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
    t · BinProductPr1 A P = f

A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
isaprop (y · BinProductPr1 A P = f)
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧

A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
isaprop (y · BinProductPr1 A P = f)
 apply hs.
      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧

 apply hs.
    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
∏ y : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
(λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
 t · BinProductPr1 A P = f × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g)
  y → y = BinProductArrow A P f g
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
H: (λ t : A ⟦ c, P ⟧,
 t · BinProductPr1 A P = f
 × t · BinProductPr2 A P = g) y
y = BinProductArrow A P f g
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y = BinProductArrow A P f g
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y = BinProductArrow A P (y · BinProductPr1 A P) g
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y =
BinProductArrow A P (y · BinProductPr1 A P)
  (y · BinProductPr2 A P)

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y =
y
· BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
    (BinProductPr2 A P)

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧

p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr1 A P =
y
· BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
    (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr1 A P

Z: Zero A

y
· BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
    (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr2 A P

      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr1 A P =
y
· BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
    (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr1 A P
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr1 A P =
y
· (BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
     (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr1 A P)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr1 A P = y · BinProductPr1 A P
 apply idpath.
      
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr2 A P =
y
· BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
    (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr2 A P
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr2 A P =
y
· (BinProductArrow A P (BinProductPr1 A P)
     (BinProductPr2 A P) · BinProductPr2 A P)
 
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
X, Y: A
P: BinProduct A X Y
c: A
f: A ⟦ c, X ⟧
g: A ⟦ c, Y ⟧
y: A ⟦ c, P ⟧
t: y · BinProductPr1 A P = f
p: y · BinProductPr2 A P = g
y · BinProductPr2 A P = y · BinProductPr2 A P
 apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Definition BinDirectSum_from_BinProduct {X Y : A} (P : BinProduct A X Y) :
    BinDirectSum X Y :=
    make_BinDirectSum
      A X Y
      (BinProductObject A P)
      (BinProductArrow A P (identity X) (ZeroArrow Z X Y))
      (BinProductArrow A P (ZeroArrow Z Y X) (identity Y))
      (BinProductPr1 A P)
      (BinProductPr2 A P)
      (make_isBinDirectSum
         _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
         (BinDirectSums_from_binproduct_bincoproducts_eq1 P)
         (BinDirectSums_from_binproduct_bincoproducts_eq4 P)
         (BinDirectSums_from_binproduct_bincoproducts_eq2 P)
         (BinDirectSums_from_binproduct_bincoproducts_eq3 P)
         (BinDirectSums_from_binproduct_bincoproducts_eq5 P)).

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
BinProds: BinProducts A
BinDirectSums A

  
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
BinProds: BinProducts A
BinDirectSums A

    
A: PreAdditive
hs: has_homsets A
Z: Zero A
BinProds: BinProducts A
X, Y: A
BinDirectSum X Y

    exact (BinDirectSum_from_BinProduct (BinProds X Y)).
  Defined.

End bindirectsums_criteria.


(** * BinDirectSums in quotient of PreAdditive category
   In this section we show that, if a PreAdditive A has BinDirectSums, then the quotient of the
   preadditive category has BinDirectSums. This is used to show that quotient of an CategoryWithAdditiveStructure is
   CategoryWithAdditiveStructure. *)
Section bindirectsums_in_quot.

  Variable A : PreAdditive.
  Hypothesis Z : Zero A.
  Hypothesis BD : BinDirectSums A.
  Hypothesis PAS : PreAdditiveSubabgrs A.
  Hypothesis PAC : PreAdditiveComps A PAS.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinCoproduct (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC) x
  y (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)))

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinCoproduct (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC) x
  y (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)))

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
has_homsets (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
∏ (c : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
(f : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧),
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
has_homsets (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
 apply has_homsets_Quotcategory.
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
∏ (c : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
(f : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧),
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c))) f ∥
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c))) f ∥
isaprop
  (∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
          c ⟧,
   to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
   × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g)
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c))) f ∥
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
→ ∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
         c ⟧,
  to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
  × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c))) f ∥
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
→ ∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
         c ⟧,
  to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
  × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c))) f ∥
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
g'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c))) g ∥
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
g'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c))) g ∥
isaprop
  (∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
          c ⟧,
   to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
   × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g)
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)))
  f
g'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c))) g ∥
hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)))
  g
→ ∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
         c ⟧,
  to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · k = f
  × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · k = g

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
(λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,
 to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · t = f
 × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · t = g) ?x

g
∏
y0 : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧,
isaprop
  ((λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y,
          c ⟧,

    × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · t = g) y0)

g

(λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,

 × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · t = g) y0
→ y0 = ?x

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)).

g
(λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c
       ⟧,

 × to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · t = g)

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS
    (FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1) = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
  · to_quot_mor A PAS
      (FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1) = g

y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)) · y0 = f
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)) · y0 = g
y0 =
to_quot_mor A PAS (FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)

Z: Zero A

x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))

g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
