  (identity (BD x y)
   · FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
f
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))
   · FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
f
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop (BD x y) c
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)
      · FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y)
      · FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1))

f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧

· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))

     (to_Pr2 (BD x y)

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
f
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))

    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop (BD x y) c (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · f1)
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y)
      · (to_In2 (BD x y)
         · FromBinDirectSum A (BD x y) f1 g1)))

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS

T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop (BD x y) c (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · f1)
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))

f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_binop (BD x y) c f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) c (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g)
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
  (to_binop (BD x y) c (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · f1)
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) (to_binop (BD x y) c f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) c (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) g)

· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =

  (to_binop (BD x y) c (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · f1)
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS

c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g

    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0

Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =

· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =

Z: Zero A

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, c ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) (f · g)
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_binop (BD x y) c
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · f1))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, c ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) (f · g)
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_binop (BD x y) c
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))

     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ BD x y, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, c ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
to_binop (BD x y) c
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
      · setquotpr
          (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · g1))

g

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (identity (BD x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
           (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
           (to_In1 (BD x y))))
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
           (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
           (to_In2 (BD x y)))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1)

g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
(to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (identity (BD x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
           (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
           (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1)

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
(to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (identity (BD x y))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
     y1)

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =

T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr

     y1)

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y)
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1 =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (identity (BD x y))
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c))
    y1
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ x, c ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ y, c ⟧
f1: A ⟦ x, c ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ y, c ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
y1: A ⟦ BD x y, c ⟧
T1: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x c)) f1
T2: to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y c)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) c)) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (identity (BD x y))

          apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinProduct (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC) x y
  (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinProduct (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC) x y
  (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
∏ (c : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
(f : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧),
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

BD: BinDirectSums A

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS

∏ (c : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)
(f : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧)
(g : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧),
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x))) f ∥
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x))) f ∥
isaprop
  (∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c,
          BD x y ⟧,
   k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
   × k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g)

x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)))
  f
g'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y))) g ∥
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)))
  g
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)))
  f
g': hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)))
  g
∃! k : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× k · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧

f

g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
(λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y
       ⟧,
 t · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
 × t · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g) ?x

g

isaprop
  ((λ t : Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c,

→ y0 = ?x

g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧

g
Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1)).

Z: Zero A

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A

f

g
to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1)
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
× to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1)
  · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g

f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y0: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))) y0 ∥
isaprop
  (y0 =
   to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1))
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y'':= issurjsetquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y0: ∥ hfiber (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))) y0 ∥
hfiber
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))))
  y0
→ y0 =
  to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1)

x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: y0 · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y1: (c --> BD x y)%abgrcat
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
y0 = to_quot_mor A PAS (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1)

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =

PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A

f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧

g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

T2: setquotpr

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =

  (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1 · identity (BD x y))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1
   · to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
       (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
       (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y)))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y)
     (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1
      · (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
     (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1
      · (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y)
     (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1 · to_Pr1 (BD x y)
      · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1 · to_Pr2 (BD x y)
      · to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (ToBinDirectSum (BD x y) f1 g1 · to_Pr2 (BD x y)
      · to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = f
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = g
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_quot_mor A PAS
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_binop c (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop c (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
  (to_binop c (BD x y) (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ c, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ c, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y))) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (f1 · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ c, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y))) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
        (to_In1 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A

f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧

T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ c, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr

      · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
        (to_In1 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ c, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y))) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
      · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
        (to_In1 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     (g1 · to_In2 (BD x y)))

g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

y0

g

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =

     y1
   · (setquotpr

        (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
      · setquotpr
          (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))

     y1
   · setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))

   · setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
to_binop c (BD x y)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1
   · (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
      · setquotpr
          (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
          (to_In1 (BD x y))))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1
   · (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y))
      · setquotpr

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
    (setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
       (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
     · setquotpr
         (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
         (to_In1 (BD x y)))
    (setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
       (to_Pr2 (BD x y))
     · setquotpr
         (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
         (to_In2 (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1) (identity (BD x y)) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
           (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
           (to_In1 (BD x y))))
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
           (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
           (to_In2 (BD x y)))))

f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧) (g : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1) (identity (BD x y)) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
           (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
           (to_In1 (BD x y))))
     (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
           (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
        (setquotpr
           (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
           (to_In2 (BD x y)))))

BD: BinDirectSums A

g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧

f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g

y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0

to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g)

  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1) (identity (BD x y)) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel
           (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr

        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))

     (setquotpr

  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
(to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1) (identity (BD x y)) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1) (identity (BD x y)) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y)))
     y1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (identity (BD x y)))

          
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· setquotpr
    (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
    (identity (BD x y))
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
c: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
f: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, x ⟧
g: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, y ⟧
f1: A ⟦ c, x ⟧
f2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1 =
f
g1: A ⟦ c, y ⟧
g2: setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1 =
g
y0: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
y1: A ⟦ c, BD x y ⟧
T1: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c x)) f1
T2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c y)) g1
y2: setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS c (BD x y))) y1 =
y0
identity (BD x y) =
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (identity (BD x y))

          apply idpath.
  Qed.

  Opaque Quotcategory_PreAdditive. (* This speeds up the following proof significantly. *)
  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinDirectSum (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
isBinDirectSum (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = identity x
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = identity y
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = to_unel x y
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = to_unel y x
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
   · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y))
   · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = identity x
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
  (to_In1 (BD x y))
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
    (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = identity x

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
     (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))) = identity x

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
     (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))) = identity x

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x x)) (f · g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
     (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))) = identity x
 
A: PreAdditive

BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ x, BD x y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ BD x y, x ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x x)) (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x x))
  (to_In1 (BD x y) · to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = identity x

(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y))) f)

PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_In1 (BD x y) · to_Pr2 (BD x y)) = to_unel x y

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x y))
  (to_unel x y) = to_unel x y

      apply idpath.
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))
· to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = to_unel y x
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
  (to_In2 (BD x y))
· setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
    (to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = to_unel y x

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
     (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))) = to_unel y x

x, y: A

Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =
to_quot_mor A PAS (f · g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
     (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))) = to_unel y x

(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y x)) (f · g)
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
     (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))

Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x)) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y x)) (f · g)
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y x))
  (to_In2 (BD x y) · to_Pr1 (BD x y)) = to_unel y x

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
   · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y))
   · to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y))
   · setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
       (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y))
   · setquotpr
       (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
       (to_In2 (BD x y))) = identity (BD x y)

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))
        (to_In1 (BD x y))))
  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y))
        (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
        (to_In2 (BD x y)))) = identity (BD x y)

Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g) =

        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) x))
        (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS x (BD x y)))

setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) (f · g)

  (Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
     (setquotpr

        (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y)))
        (to_In2 (BD x y)))) = identity (BD x y)

Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y))) g) =

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= Quotcategory_comp_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ (f : A ⟦ BD x y, y ⟧) (g : A ⟦ y, BD x y ⟧),
Quotcategory_comp A PAS PAC
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) y)) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS y (BD x y))) g) =
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) (f · g)
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr

     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
to_quot_mor A PAS (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) (to_quot_mor A PAS f) (to_quot_mor A PAS g)
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
(to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) g)
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
tmp:= setquotpr_linear A PAS PAC: ∏ f g : A ⟦ BD x y, BD x y ⟧,
setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
(to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y) f g) =
to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) f)
(setquotpr (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y))) g)
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)
 
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (to_binop (BD x y) (BD x y)
     (to_Pr1 (BD x y) · to_In1 (BD x y))
     (to_Pr2 (BD x y) · to_In2 (BD x y))) =
identity (BD x y)

      
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: A
setquotpr
  (binopeqrel_subgr_eqrel (PAS (BD x y) (BD x y)))
  (identity (BD x y)) = identity (BD x y)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.
  Transparent Quotcategory_PreAdditive. (* Transparent again *)

  
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
BinDirectSums (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
BinDirectSums (Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC)

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS

BinDirectSum x y

BD: BinDirectSums A

x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC

Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A

(x --> ?co)%abgrcat

A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
isBinDirectSum ?i1 ?i2 ?p1 ?p2

    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
 exact (BD x y).
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
(x --> BD x y)%abgrcat
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y))).
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
(y --> BD x y)%abgrcat
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y))).
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
(BD x y --> x)%abgrcat
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y))).
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
(BD x y --> y)%abgrcat
 exact (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y))).
    
A: PreAdditive
Z: Zero A
BD: BinDirectSums A
PAS: PreAdditiveSubabgrs A
PAC: PreAdditiveComps A PAS
x, y: Quotcategory_PreAdditive A PAS PAC
isBinDirectSum (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_In2 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr1 (BD x y)))
  (to_quot_mor A PAS (to_Pr2 (BD x y)))
 exact (Quotcategory_isBinDirectSum x y).
  Defined.

End bindirectsums_in_quot.

Notation "'π₁'" := (to_Pr1 _) : abgrcat.
Notation "'π₂'" := (to_Pr2 _) : abgrcat.
Notation "'ι₁'" := (to_In1 _) : abgrcat.
Notation "'ι₂'" := (to_In2 _) : abgrcat.
Local Open Scope abgrcat.


M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
BinDirectSum A B → BinDirectSum B A


M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
BinDirectSum A B → BinDirectSum B A

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
BinDirectSum B A

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
isBinDirectSum ι₂ ι₁ π₂ π₁

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(ι₂ · π₂)%cat = identity B
∧ (ι₁ · π₁)%cat = identity A
  ∧ (ι₂ · π₁)%cat = 0
    ∧ (ι₁ · π₂)%cat = 0
      ∧ (π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(ι₁ · π₁)%cat = identity A
∧ (ι₂ · π₁)%cat = 0
  ∧ (ι₁ · π₂)%cat = 0
    ∧ (π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(ι₂ · π₁)%cat = 0
∧ (ι₁ · π₂)%cat = 0
  ∧ (π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(ι₁ · π₂)%cat = 0
∧ (π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB

  
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
(to_binop AB AB (π₂ · ι₂)%cat (π₁ · ι₁)%cat =
 identity AB)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
A, B: M
AB: BinDirectSum A B
((π₂ · ι₂)%cat + (π₁ · ι₁)%cat = identity AB)%type

  (* goal is now π₂ · ι₂ + π₁ · ι₁ = 1 *)
  exact (commax (to_abgr _ _) _ _ @ to_BinOpId (pr2 AB)).
Defined.


M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
BinDirectSum x y → BinDirectSum x y


M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
BinDirectSum x y → BinDirectSum x y

  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
BinDirectSum x y

  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
oppositePreAdditive M
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
x --> ?co
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
y --> ?co
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
?co --> x
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
?co --> y
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
isBinDirectSum ?i1 ?i2 ?p1 ?p2

  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
oppositePreAdditive M
 exact (BinDirectSumOb Q).
  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
x --> Q
 exact (to_Pr1 Q).
  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
y --> Q
 exact (to_Pr2 Q).
  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
Q --> x
 exact (to_In1 Q).
  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
Q --> y
 exact (to_In2 Q).
  
M: PreAdditive
x, y: M
Q: BinDirectSum x y
isBinDirectSum π₁ π₂ ι₁ ι₂
 exact (make_isBinDirectSum (oppositePreAdditive M) _ _ _ _ _ _ _
       (to_IdIn1 Q) (to_IdIn2 Q) (to_Unel2 Q) (to_Unel1 Q)
       (to_BinOpId Q)).
Defined.


M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
isBinDirectSum (identity A) 0 (identity A) 0


M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
isBinDirectSum (identity A) 0 (identity A) 0

  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · 0)%cat = identity Z)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · 0)%cat = 0)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · identity A)%cat = 0)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (identity A · identity A)%cat
   (0 · 0)%cat = identity A)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type
 apply id_right.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · 0)%cat = identity Z)%type
 apply ArrowsToZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · 0)%cat = 0)%type
 apply ArrowsToZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · identity A)%cat = 0)%type
 apply ArrowsFromZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (identity A · identity A)%cat
   (0 · 0)%cat = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (identity A) (0 · 0)%cat = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (identity A) (to_unel A A) = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(identity A + to_unel A A = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(identity A = identity A)%type
 reflexivity.
Qed.

Z: Zero M
A: M
BinDirectSum A Z


M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
BinDirectSum A Z

  exact (make_BinDirectSum _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ (isTrivialDirectSum _ _)).
Defined.

Z: Zero M

isBinDirectSum 0 (identity A) 0 (identity A)

M: PreAdditive

((0 · 0)%cat = identity Z)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · identity A)%cat = 0)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · 0)%cat = 0)%type
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (0 · 0)%cat
   (identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type

  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · 0)%cat = identity Z)%type
 apply ArrowsToZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type
 apply id_right.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((0 · identity A)%cat = 0)%type
 apply ArrowsFromZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
((identity A · 0)%cat = 0)%type
 apply ArrowsToZero.
  
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (0 · 0)%cat
   (identity A · identity A)%cat = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (0 · 0)%cat (identity A) = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_binop A A (to_unel A A) (identity A) = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(to_unel A A + identity A = identity A)%type
 
M: PreAdditive
Z: Zero M
A: M
(identity A = identity A)%type
 reflexivity.
Qed.

M: PreAdditive
A, B, C: M
S: BinDirectSum A B
r: z_iso C S
isBinDirectSum
  (pr12 (C,,
         (ι₁ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
         (ι₂ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
         (r · π₁)%cat,, (r · π₂)%cat))
  (pr122 (C,,
          (ι₁ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
          (ι₂ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
          (r · π₁)%cat,, (r · π₂)%cat))
  (pr122 (pr2
            (C,,
             (ι₁ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
             (ι₂ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
             (r · π₁)%cat,, (r · π₂)%cat)))
  (pr222 (pr2
            (C,,
             (ι₁ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
             (ι₂ · z_iso_inv r)%cat,,
             (r · π₁)%cat,, (r · π₂)%cat)))

M: PreAdditive
A, B, C: M
S: BinDirectSum A B
r: z_iso C S
((π₁ · ι₁)%cat + (π₂ · ι₂)%cat = identity S)%type
 exact (to_BinOpId S).
Defined.
